---
title: "Presentation Plots"
author: "Fabian Jetzinger"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    code_download: false
    toc: TRUE
    toc_depth: 2
    theme: spacelab
    self_contained: true
    highlight: tango
    fig_width: 9
    fig_height: 6
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      results = 'hide', fig.align = "center")

library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(grid)
library(ComplexUpset)
library(ggpubr)
library(RColorConesa)

r_source_dir <- if (dir.exists("R")) "R" else "src/plotting/R"

source(file.path(r_source_dir, "01_config.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "02_themes.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "03_plot_functions.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "04_data_loading.R"))
```


```{r load-data}
tools_to_load <- list(
  IsoSeq = c("IsoQuant", "FLAIR")
)

pres_data <- list()
pres_raw <- list()
for (platform in names(tools_to_load)) {
  pres_data[[platform]] <- list()
  pres_raw[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in tools_to_load[[platform]]) {
    src_dir <- src_dirs[[platform]][[method]]
    paths <- get_paths(src_dir)
    df_lists <- load_df_lists(paths)
    pres_raw[[platform]][[method]] <- df_lists
    pres_data[[platform]][[method]] <- process_and_plot(
      df_lists$Bclass_df_list, df_lists$Kclass_df_list,
      technology = platform, fl_threshold = 1
    )
  }
}
```


## IsoQuant vs FLAIR — PacBio Brain

```{r isoquant-vs-flair-brain, fig.width=14, fig.height=6}
pres_labels_brain <- c("Join & Call", "Call & Join",
                        paste("Brain", 1:5))

make_pres_bar <- function(results, tissue, title, ylims, labels) {
  plot_key <- paste0(tissue, "_plots")
  p <- results[[plot_key]][[1]]

  p +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = labels) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cat.palette,
                      labels = c("Full Splice Match", "Incomplete Splice Match",
                                 "Novel In Catalog", "Novel Not In Catalog",
                                 "Genic Genomic", "Antisense", "Fusion",
                                 "Intergenic", "Genic Intron")) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) format(x, scientific = FALSE)) +
    ggtitle(title) +
    ylab("# transcripts") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title   = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 18, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 11, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.title   = element_text(size = 13),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = ylims)
}

p_iq <- make_pres_bar(pres_data$IsoSeq$IsoQuant, "brain",
                       "IsoQuant", c(0, 125000), pres_labels_brain)
p_fl <- make_pres_bar(pres_data$IsoSeq$FLAIR, "brain",
                       "FLAIR", c(0, 125000), pres_labels_brain)

p_iq_legend <- p_iq +
  theme(legend.position = "right") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 1, title = "Structural Category"))

figure <- (p_iq | plot_spacer() | p_fl | cowplot::get_legend(p_iq_legend)) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 0.05, 1, 0.35), axes = "collect_y") +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "PacBio IsoSeq — Brain",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold",
                                            hjust = 0.5))
  )

final <- figure

if (!dir.exists("plot_creation")) dir.create("plot_creation")
ggsave("plot_creation/pres_isoquant_vs_flair_brain.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = final,
       width = 14, height = 6.5, unit = "in")

final
```


## IsoQuant vs FLAIR — UJC Upset (Brain)

```{r isoquant-vs-flair-upset-brain, fig.width=18, fig.height=7}
pres_upset_labels_brain <- c("Join & Call", "Call & Join",
                              paste("Brain", 1:5))

iq_df_lists <- pres_raw$IsoSeq$IsoQuant
fl_df_lists <- pres_raw$IsoSeq$FLAIR

iq_b_filtered <- lapply(iq_df_lists$Bclass_df_list, function(df) {
  df %>% filter(!is.na(FL) & FL >= 1)
})
fl_b_filtered <- lapply(fl_df_lists$Bclass_df_list, function(df) {
  df %>% filter(!is.na(FL) & FL >= 1)
})

iq_upset <- create_upset_plot(iq_b_filtered, pres_upset_labels_brain,
                               "IsoQuant", n = 10)
fl_upset <- create_upset_plot(fl_b_filtered, pres_upset_labels_brain,
                               "FLAIR", n = 10)

upset_legend_src <- iq_upset[["comb_bar"]] +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
        legend.text  = element_text(size = 11)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 1, title = "Structural Category"))
upset_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(upset_legend_src)

figure_upset <- (wrap_elements(full = iq_upset[["upset"]]) |
                 plot_spacer() |
                 wrap_elements(full = fl_upset[["upset"]]) |
                 upset_legend) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 0.05, 1, 0.3)) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "PacBio IsoSeq — Brain — UJC Overlap",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold",
                                            hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave("plot_creation/pres_isoquant_vs_flair_upset_brain.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = figure_upset,
       width = 18, height = 7, unit = "in")

figure_upset
```


## IsoQuant vs FLAIR — Expression of UJCs across samples (Brain)

```{r isoquant-vs-flair-comb-fl-bar-brain, fig.width=14, fig.height=6}
iq_comb_fl <- pres_data$IsoSeq$IsoQuant$brain_comb_fl_bar_plot +
  ggtitle("IsoQuant") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) format(x, scientific = FALSE))

fl_comb_fl <- pres_data$IsoSeq$FLAIR$brain_comb_fl_bar_plot +
  ggtitle("FLAIR") +
  ylab(NULL) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) format(x, scientific = FALSE))

legend_src <- pres_data$IsoSeq$IsoQuant$brain_comb_fl_bar_plot +
  theme(legend.position = "right") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 1, title = "Structural\nCategory"))
comb_fl_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_src)

figure_comb_fl <- (iq_comb_fl | plot_spacer() | fl_comb_fl |
                   comb_fl_legend) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 0.05, 1, 0.3)) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "PacBio IsoSeq — Brain — Expression of UJCs across samples",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold",
                                            hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave("plot_creation/pres_isoquant_vs_flair_comb_fl_brain.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = figure_comb_fl,
       width = 14, height = 6, unit = "in")

figure_comb_fl
```


## IsoQuant vs FLAIR — SIRV & TUSCO Dumbbell Plot (Brain)

```{r load-tusco}
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "06_sirv_analysis.R"))
library(ggstats)

load_tusco_results <- function(base_dir = "tusco_results") {
  rdata_files <- list.files(base_dir, pattern = "\\.RData$",
                            recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
  tusco_results <- list()
  for (file_path in rdata_files) {
    if (!file.exists(file_path) || file.info(file_path)$size == 0) next
    rel_path <- gsub(paste0("^", base_dir, "/"), "", file_path)
    rel_path <- gsub("\\_tusco.RData$", "", rel_path)
    path_parts <- strsplit(rel_path, "/")[[1]]
    load_env <- new.env()
    tryCatch({
      load(file_path, envir = load_env)
      loaded_objects <- ls(load_env)
      if (length(loaded_objects) == 0) next
      loaded_data <- if ("data_list" %in% loaded_objects) {
        load_env$data_list
      } else {
        get(loaded_objects[1], envir = load_env)
      }
      for (i in seq_len(length(path_parts) - 1)) {
        partial_path <- paste("tusco_results",
          paste(paste0("[[\"", path_parts[1:i], "\"]]"), collapse = ""), sep = "")
        eval(parse(text = paste("if(is.null(", partial_path, "))",
                                partial_path, "<- list()")))
      }
      assignment_path <- paste("tusco_results",
        paste(paste0("[[\"", path_parts, "\"]]"), collapse = ""), sep = "")
      eval(parse(text = paste(assignment_path, "<- loaded_data")))
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
  }
  tusco_results
}

rename_names_at_level <- function(x, target_level, current_level = 1) {
  if (!is.list(x)) return(x)
  if (current_level == target_level) {
    old_names <- names(x)
    new_names <- old_names
    new_names[old_names %in% c("Bconcat", "B100K0", "B100K0.join")] <- "concat"
    new_names[old_names %in% c("Kconcat", "B0K100", "B0K100.join")] <- "concat"
    names(x) <- new_names
    return(x)
  }
  lapply(x, function(e) rename_names_at_level(e, target_level, current_level + 1))
}

tusco_base_dir <- file.path(base_path, "reports", "tusco_results")
tusco_results <- load_tusco_results(tusco_base_dir)
tusco_renamed <- rename_names_at_level(tusco_results, target_level = 5)
```


```{r pres-dumbbell-brain, fig.width=14, fig.height=5}
preprocess_metrics <- function(concat_df, tama_df) {
  metric_names <- colnames(concat_df)
  bind_rows(
    tibble(
      method_dataset = rep(c("concat_sirv", "concat_tusco"), each = length(metric_names)),
      metric = rep(metric_names, times = 2),
      value  = c(as.numeric(concat_df[1, ]), as.numeric(concat_df[2, ]))
    ),
    tibble(
      method_dataset = rep(c("tama_sirv", "tama_tusco"), each = length(metric_names)),
      metric = rep(metric_names, times = 2),
      value  = c(as.numeric(tama_df[1, ]), as.numeric(tama_df[2, ]))
    )
  )
}

metric_full_names <- c(
  "Sn"    = "Sensitivity",
  "PDR"   = "Positive Detection Rate",
  "nrPre" = "Non-redundant Precision",
  "rPre"  = "Redundant Precision",
  "1/red" = "Inverse Redundancy",
  "1-FDR" = "1 \u2013 False Discovery Rate"
)
metric_order <- c("Sn", "PDR", "nrPre", "rPre", "1/red", "1-FDR")

build_pres_dumbbell <- function(metrics_long, title) {
  metrics_long <- metrics_long %>%
    mutate(metric = factor(metric, levels = rev(metric_order)))

  metrics_wide <- metrics_long %>%
    separate(method_dataset, into = c("method", "dataset"), sep = "_") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = method, values_from = value)

  points_df <- metrics_wide %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(concat, tama),
                 names_to = "method", values_to = "value")

  ggplot() +
    ggstats::geom_stripped_rows(
      data = metrics_wide, aes(y = metric),
      width = 1, nudge_y = 0
    ) +
    geom_segment(
      data = metrics_wide,
      aes(x = concat, xend = tama, y = metric, yend = metric,
          color = dataset),
      linewidth = 1.2,
      position = position_nudge(
        y = ifelse(metrics_wide$dataset == "sirv", 0.15, -0.15)
      )
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = points_df,
      aes(x = value, y = metric, shape = method,
          fill = dataset, color = dataset),
      size = 3, stroke = 0.8,
      position = position_nudge(
        y = ifelse(points_df$dataset == "sirv", 0.15, -0.15)
      )
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      name = "Evaluation",
      values = c("sirv" = "#cab2d6", "tusco" = "#1b9e77"),
      labels = c("sirv" = "SIRVs", "tusco" = "TUSCO"),
      guide = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(linetype = 1, linewidth = 2, shape = NA),
        order = 1)
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("sirv" = "#cab2d6", "tusco" = "#1b9e77"), guide = "none"
    ) +
    scale_shape_manual(
      name = "Strategy",
      values = c("concat" = 16, "tama" = 17),
      labels = c("concat" = "Join & Call", "tama" = "Call & Join"),
      guide = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(fill = "black", size = 3), order = 2)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.03))) +
    scale_y_discrete(labels = metric_full_names) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    labs(x = "Metric value (%)", y = NULL, title = title) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title       = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 18),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      axis.text        = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text.y      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      axis.title       = element_text(size = 13),
      legend.position  = "none"
    )
}

iq_branch <- tusco_renamed$tusco_full$isoseq$isoquant$B100K0
iq_concat <- iq_branch$concat$radar_df[c("metrics_values_sirv", "metrics_values_tusco"), ]
iq_tama   <- iq_branch$TAMA$radar_df[c("metrics_values_sirv", "metrics_values_tusco"), ]

cat("=== iq_concat ===\n"); print(iq_concat); print(class(iq_concat)); print(colnames(iq_concat))
cat("=== iq_tama ===\n"); print(iq_tama); print(class(iq_tama))

iq_long   <- preprocess_metrics(iq_concat, iq_tama)
cat("=== iq_long ===\n"); print(iq_long); print(colnames(iq_long))
p_iq_db   <- build_pres_dumbbell(iq_long, "IsoQuant") +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

fl_branch <- tusco_renamed$tusco_full$isoseq$flair_ar_sr$B100K0
fl_concat <- fl_branch$concat$radar_df[c("metrics_values_sirv", "metrics_values_tusco"), ]
fl_tama   <- fl_branch$TAMA$radar_df[c("metrics_values_sirv", "metrics_values_tusco"), ]
fl_long   <- preprocess_metrics(fl_concat, fl_tama)
p_fl_db   <- build_pres_dumbbell(fl_long, "FLAIR") +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank())

legend_src_db <- build_pres_dumbbell(iq_long, "") +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        legend.box = "vertical",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
        legend.text  = element_text(size = 11))
db_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_src_db)

x_title_grob <- wrap_elements(full = grid::textGrob(
  "Metric value (%)", gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 13)
))

plots_row <- (p_iq_db | plot_spacer() | p_fl_db | db_legend) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 0.05, 1, 0.3))

figure_db <- (plots_row / x_title_grob) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 0.04)) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "PacBio IsoSeq — Brain — SIRV & TUSCO Evaluation",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold",
                                            hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave("plot_creation/pres_isoquant_vs_flair_dumbbell_brain.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = figure_db,
       width = 14, height = 5, unit = "in")

figure_db
```
